action: Removed dead duplicate redirect on line 30 of next.config.ts
detail: /trompe-loeil-architectural-illusions had two redirect entries — line 21 (→ /services/trompe-loeil-architectural-illusions) and line 30 (→ /trompe-loeil-houston). Next.js uses first match, so line 30 was dead code. Line 30 also would have created a two-hop chain. Removed line 30; line 21 remains active and resolves correctly.
gsc_issue: Not found (404) reported in GSC Coverage report 2026-03-10 — likely stale cache from before redirect was added
